/usr/bin/c++   -std=c++17 -Wall -O3 -g -O3 -DNDEBUG  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/uav_utils-test.dir/src/uav_utils_test.cpp.o  -o /home/jacob/star-searcher/devel/lib/uav_utils/uav_utils-test   -L/home/jacob/star-searcher/src/STAR-Searcher/Star-Searcher/search_planner/uav_simulator/Utils/cmake_utils/lib/mosek8  -L/home/jacob/star-searcher/build/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jacob/star-searcher/src/STAR-Searcher/Star-Searcher/search_planner/uav_simulator/Utils/cmake_utils/lib/mosek8:/home/jacob/star-searcher/build/gtest:/home/jacob/star-searcher/build/gtest/lib ../../../../../../gtest/lib/libgtest.so -luav_utils -lpthread
